changes.value:
Six browser (chromium) failures in src/components/board-integration.browser.test.tsx:
- renders the board with all columns and task cards
- shows tasks in correct columns based on real data
- move task between columns: entity changes on disk
- drag task card on DropZone with FileDropProvider active
- file drag over non-DropZone area is blocked by FileDropProvider
- task drag over non-DropZone area is NOT blocked (regression test)

#test-failure
